etymology.description: 𠬤 (handcuffs) + 廾 (hands) facing away -> denote release
etymology.interpretation: The character 𠬤 is a phono-semantic compound where the elements represent the concept of release, with emphasis on the depiction of hands facing away from handcuffs, indicating freeing or removing restraints. This aligns semantically with 放(放) (fàng, "release").
